generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing real-time occupancy status within building spaces, integrated via Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and processed by Ditto for digital twin synchronization. Supports post-occupancy data collection for reinforcement learning optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring real-time temperature values across building zones, feeding data into the digital twin via Eclipse Hono for bidirectional synchronization with physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing real-time humidity levels to support HVAC and indoor air quality optimization within the digital twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Luminosity sensor measuring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control policies, integrated with TwinLight and BOREALIS reinforcement learning systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building automation sensor detecting movement patterns to optimize energy usage and occupancy-based control strategies within the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption sensor monitoring real-time power usage across building systems, enabling predictive analytics and optimization services."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance MotionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionDetector
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched 3D Building Information Model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data including building components, relationships, and control semantics. Serves as the static backbone for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data from all sensing components, normalized and integrated into the digital twin for semantic coherence with the BIM model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, MotionDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for building control systems including lighting control policies from TwinLight and reinforcement learning-based optimization from BOREALIS."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D representation environment built in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance DeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Standardized device metadata extracted from BIM including tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses for middleware integration and IoT connectivity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity middleware for real-time data ingestion from physical sensors using MQTT-based communication protocols, enabling bidirectional synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ControlAutomationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform providing state synchronization and bidirectional communication between physical assets and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment supporting interactive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations with high-fidelity representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ScenarioTestingService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation framework automating the extraction of domain semantics and generation of runtime artifacts through model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlLogicModel, DeviceMetadata
]

instance HonoDittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration tool scanning BIM models to identify twinnable devices and extract metadata for establishing MQTT-based communication channels."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning system dynamically optimizing building operations (e.g., lighting, energy use) based on real-time sensor data and control policies."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization of building operations including energy consumption, occupancy, and environmental metrics via Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationsDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating reinforcement learning to identify optimization opportunities for energy-efficient lighting policies and visual comfort adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, LightingComfortInsight
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated commissioning and bidirectional communication with Building Control Systems including lighting control via TwinLight."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction, EnergyControlAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service supporting virtual testing of operational changes such as refurbishments or energy-efficient policies before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentScenarioInsight
]

instance ScenarioTestingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling immersive scenario testing within Unreal Engine 5 to evaluate the impact of policy changes on building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides PolicyImpactInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing real-time data ingestion from physical sensors via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIngestionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationsDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard displaying operational metrics including energy use, occupancy patterns, and environmental conditions for facility managers."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics identifying opportunities for energy reduction through optimized lighting and HVAC control strategies derived from reinforcement learning."
]

instance LightingComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort metrics based on real-time luminosity and occupancy data to inform adaptive lighting policies."
]

instance RefurbishmentScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Virtual simulation results evaluating the impact of proposed refurbishment plans on building performance and operational efficiency."
]

instance PolicyImpactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of policy changes on building operations through immersive scenario testing within the digital twin environment."
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on real-time occupancy and luminosity data, executed via TwinLight control policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic optimization of energy consumption through automated control of HVAC and lighting systems based on predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Facility manager-initiated adjustment of control parameters (e.g., lighting thresholds) via the digital twin interface, propagated to physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AlertingSystemAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated notification system for anomalies including sensor failures, energy spikes, or operational deviations from expected patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data ingestion status and quality metrics from physical sensors to ensure reliable digital twin synchronization."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT transmits **control signals and commands** back to the physical building via the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling **closed-loop operation**. For example, the DT may adjust lighting levels in response to occupancy data or energy optimization goals (as demonstrated in **TwinLight** and **BOREALIS**). The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to manually override or fine-tune control parameters, which are then relayed to the physical actuators. The framework ensures **low-latency communication** between the virtual twin and physical systems, supporting **real-time adjustments** to building operations (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC control). The **bidirectional communication** is governed by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture, allowing for modular integration of new control services."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring low-latency updates for critical operational data. The framework supports **event-driven data exchange**, where sensor inputs and control signals are processed with minimal delay to maintain coherence between the DT and the physical twin. While the document does not specify sub-second synchronization or batch processing for non-critical data, the emphasis is on **live synchronization** enabled by **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for continuous monitoring and adaptive control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Model**: Central semantic repository for building data.
  - **Middleware Layer (Hono/Ditto)**: Enables **real-time data exchange** and **bidirectional synchronization**.
  - **Control Layer**: Implements **domain-specific control logic** (e.g., lighting, HVAC) via **TwinLight** and **BOREALIS**.
  - **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine)**: Provides **immersive interfaces** for facility managers.
  - **Extension Points**: Modular slots for integrating **third-party services** (e.g., predictive maintenance, energy analytics).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across building infrastructures, with the **BIM model acting as the unifying semantic layer**. The architecture is designed for **interoperability** with existing AECO tools and standards."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **all phases of the building life cycle**, from **design and construction to operation and refurbishment**, with specific representations for:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Initial BIM model with static geometric and functional data.
  - **As-constructed**: Updated BIM model incorporating deviations from the design (e.g., as-built documentation).
  - **As-operated**: Dynamic DT with real-time sensor data, control logic, and operational feedback (e.g., energy performance, occupancy patterns).
  The framework supports **continuous synchronization** between these phases, enabling **predictive maintenance**, **retrofit planning**, and **adaptive optimization**. For example, the **BOREALIS project** demonstrates how post-occupancy sensor data can iteratively refine control policies over time, closing the loop between design and operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic Coherence**: The BIM model provides a **unified semantic foundation**, reducing fragmentation and ensuring consistency between physical and virtual representations.
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto enable **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing divergence between the physical and virtual systems.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**: The BIM model undergoes **validation** before deployment to ensure accuracy.
  - **ODTE Metric**: Quantifies the **overall entanglement** of the DT, measuring its alignment with the physical counterpart.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: The framework supports **event-driven updates** to address dynamic changes (e.g., sensor failures, occupancy fluctuations).
  - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: Continuous monitoring of the DT’s performance against real-world data to detect and correct **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al. [49])."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **IoT connectivity** and **Eclipse Ditto** for **digital twin management**, enabling real-time data exchange via standardized protocols. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, REST, OData) are not explicitly detailed in the document, the framework is designed for **low-latency, high-fidelity communication** between physical assets and the DT. The middleware layers support **bidirectional synchronization**, ensuring seamless integration with Building Control Systems (BCS) and other operational technologies."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed using a **service-oriented architecture** with **modular components** hosted on middleware platforms (e.g., Eclipse Hono and Ditto). The deployment process is automated via **model-driven transformations**, generating runtime artifacts from validated BIM models. While the document does not specify cloud-based deployment or proprietary tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD), the framework supports **scalable and maintainable** DT implementations. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer operates separately but integrates seamlessly with the middleware and BIM-based core, enabling immersive monitoring and control interfaces."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
  1. **Middleware Integration**: **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** serve as the backbone for bidirectional communication, enabling seamless data exchange between the DT and external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, facility management tools).
  2. **Modular Architecture**: Standardized extension points allow for integration with third-party services and analytics tools, supporting interoperability across heterogeneous environments.
  3. **AECO-Specific Standards**: The framework adheres to **BIM** and **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, ensuring compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools.
  While specific standards like **IFC or COBie** are not mentioned, the emphasis is on **semantic interoperability** and **automated data exchange** to facilitate collaboration across disciplines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards** such as **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** and leverages **open-source middleware** (Eclipse Hono and Ditto) for connectivity. The framework is grounded in **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, ensuring formalized, reusable, and interoperable artifacts. While specific standards like **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** or **Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie)** are not explicitly mentioned, the system is designed for compatibility with existing AECO workflows and tools."
]
